common.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
common.errorNetwork: Connection error. Please check if the server is running and try again.
common.errorNotFound: The requested record was not found. It may have been deleted.
common.errorDuplicateCode: A record with this code already exists. Please use a different code.
common.errorConflict: Could not complete the operation due to a data conflict.
common.errorDeleteInUse: This record cannot be deleted because it is used by other records.
common.errorBadRequest: The submitted data is invalid. Please check the fields and try again.
common.errorServer: Internal server error. Please try again later.
common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this record?
common.name: Name

home.welcome: Welcome to the Industrial Management System
home.description: Manage raw materials, products, and optimize your production for maximum sales value.
home.newRawMaterialDesc: Register a new supply in the system
home.newProductDesc: Register a new product with composition
home.viewOptimizationDesc: Calculate optimal production based on stock
home.ctaDescription: Run the optimization algorithm to discover the best combination of products to manufacture with your available stock.

rawMaterial.title: Raw Materials
rawMaterial.listDescription: Manage the registration and stock of raw materials used in production.
rawMaterial.name: Name
rawMaterial.searchPlaceholder: Search by code, name, or unit...
rawMaterial.noSearchResults: No raw materials found for the search.
rawMaterial.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the raw material "{name}"?

rawMaterial.errorDeleteInUse: This raw material cannot be deleted because it is used in product compositions. Remove it from products first.
rawMaterial.errorLoad: Error loading raw materials. Please try again.

product.listDescription: Manage product registration and their raw material compositions.
product.name: Name
product.descriptionPlaceholder: E.g.: Crunchy bread made with wheat flour...

product.noSearchResults: No products found for the search.
product.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the product "{name}"?
product.errorDuplicateCode: A product with this code already exists. Please use a different code.

product.errorLoad: Error loading products. Please try again.
product.errorRawMaterialNotFound: One of the raw materials in the composition was not found. Please check the data.

production.title: Production Optimization
production.heroDescription: Use the optimization algorithm to automatically discover which products to manufacture and in what quantity, maximizing total sales value based on available raw material stock.
production.step1Desc: The system checks all available raw materials and their stock quantities.
production.step2Desc: Sorts products by unit price and calculates the maximum producible of each, prioritizing the most valuable.
production.step3Desc: Presents the best combination of products to manufacture, maximizing total revenue.
production.actionDescription: Click the button below to run the optimization algorithm. It will analyze your current stock and suggest the best product combination to maximize your revenue.
production.prerequisitesWarning: To use optimization, you need to have raw materials and products registered. Add them in the corresponding sections.
production.noStockWarning: All raw materials have zero stock. Update stock quantities so optimization can suggest products.
production.searchStock: Search raw material by code or name...
production.noStockResults: No raw materials found for the search.
production.noSuggestionsHint: Current stock is insufficient to manufacture any product. Check raw material quantities and product compositions.
production.description: Analyze current stock and discover which products to manufacture for maximum total sales value.
production.errorOptimize: Error calculating production optimization. Please try again.
